findings.title: Service Bus Standard SKU does not support Private Endpoints — deployment will fail
findings.description: Task 7 specifies Service Bus Namespace with SKU 'Standard' and a private endpoint. Azure Service Bus private endpoints require the Premium tier namespace.
findings.recommendation: Change Service Bus Namespace SKU from 'Standard' to 'Premium' in the Resource Inventory table, Task 7 specification, and the Security Configuration table.

findings.title: APIM Standard v2 is publicly reachable with no AFD header validation
findings.description: APIM Standard v2 gateway is publicly accessible. Without X-Azure-FDID header validation policy, any actor can bypass the WAF.
findings.recommendation: Add APIM inbound policy that validates X-Azure-FDID header matches Front Door profile ID.

findings.title: Front Door WAF in Detection mode with no defined Prevention activation timeline
findings.description: Detection mode logs attacks but does not block them. No timeline or criteria defined for switching to Prevention.
findings.recommendation: Define concrete transition: Prevention mode in prod, Detection only in dev. Add gating criteria to Phase 5 validation.

findings.title: AI Foundry Hub has no private endpoint — management API publicly reachable
findings.description: AI Foundry (Azure ML workspace) exposes API at privatelink.api.azureml.ms. No PE defined in plan. Missing 2 DNS zones.
findings.recommendation: Add PE for AI Foundry Hub plus 2 DNS zones (privatelink.api.azureml.ms, privatelink.notebooks.azure.net).

findings.title: Cosmos DB local key authentication not explicitly disabled
findings.description: Plan does not specify disableLocalAuth: true. Master keys remain active, providing unrestricted access to PHI.
findings.recommendation: Add disableLocalAuth: true to Cosmos DB account configuration.

findings.title: Event Hubs and Service Bus local auth (SAS keys) not disabled
findings.description: SAS keys generated by default. Inconsistent with Storage (allowSharedKeyAccess: false). NEN 7510 gap.
findings.recommendation: Add disableLocalAuth: true to both Event Hubs and Service Bus namespaces.

findings.title: No RBAC role assignments defined for Managed Identities
findings.description: MIs defined but no role assignment plan. Step 5 cannot generate functional IaC without this specification.
findings.recommendation: Add RBAC Role Assignments section listing each MI, target scope, and role definition.

findings.title: No diagnostic settings specification — NEN 7510 compliance gap
findings.description: No task specifies Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings for resource-level audit logging.
findings.recommendation: Add diagnostics task mapping each resource to log categories routed to Log Analytics.

findings.title: APIM subscription keys alongside OAuth 2.0 increases attack surface
findings.description: Subscription keys are long-lived, hard to rotate. Pure OAuth 2.0 provides better audit trails.
findings.recommendation: Remove subscription-key requirement for production. Retain for dev/test only.

findings.title: Front Door Standard cannot use Private Link to APIM origin
findings.description: Front Door Premium supports Private Link origins, eliminating need for public APIM.
findings.recommendation: Consider upgrading Front Door to Premium for production (cost trade-off).

compact_for_parent: Pass 1 (security-governance) | 1 must_fix, 6 should_fix, 3 suggestions. Critical: Service Bus Standard will FAIL PE deployment (needs Premium). Gaps: APIM public with no AFD header validation; WAF Detection with no Prevention timeline; AI Foundry Hub missing PE (2 DNS zones absent); Cosmos DB and messaging lack disableLocalAuth; no RBAC role assignment plan; no diagnostic settings spec (NEN 7510 gap).
